parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "p_conversation_id": $('Guard + Build Payload').first().json.conversation_id, "p_from": $('Guard + Build Payload').first().json.from, "p_to": $('Guard + Build Payload').first().json.to, "p_body": $('Guard + Build Payload').first().json.text, "p_telnyx_message_id": ($json.data && $json.data.id) ? $json.data.id : null } }}
